violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Food contact surface of utensil/equipment was not properly cleaned and sanitized. The ice scoop for ice machine was found in food safe bin in need of cleaning (small build up)

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Operate as follows: 1) hot soapy water 2) clear water rinse 3) sanitizing rinse 4) air dry all utensils Ensure step 2 is not missed.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
